summary: Full-stack test of Karya backend rebuild + new Daily Reports feature. Executed 36 pytest cases covering all pillars (auth, workforce, payroll, subcontractors, NL command, compliance, feed, SOPs, org memory, assistant, dashboard, notifications, insights, files, voice) plus the new /api/reports/generate flow. All 36 backend tests PASSED. Frontend smoke tested with seeded session cookie: dashboard/workforce/payroll/reports render, all requested data-testid selectors are present, existing daily report opens with photo + sections. Zero critical or blocking issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1187 lines — consider splitting into modules (auth, workforce, payroll, subs, compliance, feed, sops, knowledge, reports) for maintainability, but not blocking.

/api/files/{path:path} accepts token via ?auth= query string — fine for usage but the token then leaks into server access logs / browser history. Consider signed short-lived URLs if this becomes production.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on selectors and smoke flows tested

seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_-prefixed items (project, workers, subcontractor, feed, knowledge, compliance, report, files). Subcontractor and report cleaned up in-tests; worker deleted in teardown. TEST_ compliance/knowledge left because no delete endpoints exist — safe to ignore.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at 100%. All 9 sidebar nav-* testids exist, /reports page has full set of testids (report-project-select, report-date-input, report-location-input, report-notes-input, report-geolocate-button, generate-report-button, report-library, report-card-{id}, report-detail, delete-report-{id}). Photo upload + AI report generation working end-to-end (verified real JPEG /tmp/site_photo.jpg was analyzed by Claude — report referenced 'timber/brick-clad building with pitched roof' visible in photo). Live Google News RSS fetch works (returns verified items with URLs). Whisper transcription works with test.wav.
